TextView.android:text: You can add EXE, shortcut, folder, URL, CMD, PowerShell, and Run commands. Long press to edit or delete.
Tap a tile to run it on the selected PC. Links open in the default browser or in the app that handles that protocol.
No shortcuts yet. Use the plus tile to add one.
In a clean setup, the Worker URL and selected PC are not embedded into the APK. You enter the connection details later.
PCs in the account will be summarized here.

androidx.appcompat.widget.SwitchCompat.android:text: Notify when the PC shuts down

TextView.android:text: Sets how many notifications are shown in the notification center at once. Use a value between 5 and 50.

EditText.android:hint: The selected process name appears here

TextView.android:text: The touchpad area throttles requests; in normal personal use it does not hit the limit aggressively.

Button.android:text: Create a new folder in the current folder

TextView.android:text: Tap a folder to open it. Long press to select an item, and tap a file to use the run/download flow.
Choose a camera on the selected PC, capture a single frame, or start live viewing.
A quick preview of the selected file appears here.
The latest command result will appear here.
Estimated limit information will appear here.
The last 5 notifications will appear here.
